title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su shares five essential practices for using Claude Cowork effectively after three months of experience. Key recommendations include keeping root CLAUDE.md files lean, structuring MEMORY.md correctly, archiving outdated content, migrating Claude Projects into Cowork workstations, and understanding when to use skills versus workstations.
